creator: guru@unixarea.de
text:
while making the port misc/kdeedu4 it can't find the shared lib libgps.so:

..
Linking CXX shared module
./../../../../lib/GpsdPositionProviderPlugin.so
cd
/usr/ports/misc/kdeedu4/work/kdeedu-4.3.1/build/marble/src/plugins/positionprovider/gpsd
&& /usr/local/bin/cmake -E cmake_link_script
CMakeFiles/GpsdPositionProviderPlugin.dir/link.txt --verbose=1
/usr/bin/c++  -fPIC -O2 -pipe -fno-strict-aliasing -Woverloaded-virtual
-fvisibility=hidden -fvisibility-inlines-hidden -O2 -DNDEBUG
-DQT_NO_DEBUG  -lc -shared -Wl,-soname,GpsdPositionProviderPlugin.so -o
./../../../../lib/GpsdPositionProviderPlugin.so
CMakeFiles/GpsdPositionProviderPlugin.dir/GpsdPositionProviderPlugin_automoc.o
CMakeFiles/GpsdPositionProviderPlugin.dir/GpsdConnection.o
CMakeFiles/GpsdPositionProviderPlugin.dir/GpsdPositionProviderPlugin.o
CMakeFiles/GpsdPositionProviderPlugin.dir/GpsdThread.o
-L/usr/local/lib/qt4 -L/usr/local/kde4/lib
-L/usr/ports/misc/kdeedu4/work/kdeedu-4.3.1/build/lib
/usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtCore.so -pthread /usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtDBus.so
/usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtGui.so /usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtXml.so
/usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtSvg.so /usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtNetwork.so
/usr/local/kde4/lib/libkdecore.so.7.0.1
/usr/local/kde4/lib/libkdeui.so.7.0.1
/usr/local/kde4/lib/libkio.so.7.0.1 -lgps
./../../../../lib/libmarblewidget.so.5.0.1
/usr/local/kde4/lib/libkio.so.7.0.1 /usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtXml.so
/usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtNetwork.so /usr/local/kde4/lib/libkdeui.so.7.0.1
/usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtGui.so /usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtSvg.so
/usr/local/kde4/lib/libkdecore.so.7.0.1 /usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtCore.so
-pthread /usr/local/lib/qt4/libQtDBus.so
-Wl,-rpath,/usr/local/kde4/:/usr/local/lib/qt4:/usr/local/kde4/lib
-Wl,-rpath-link,/usr/local/kde4/lib
/usr/bin/ld: cannot find -lgps
*** Error code 1

the lib is in /usr/local/lib:

$ ls -l /usr/local/lib/libgps.*
-rw-r--r--  1 root  wheel  262738 Oct 16 18:07 /usr/local/lib/libgps.a
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel     927 Oct 16 18:07 /usr/local/lib/libgps.la
lrwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel      12 Oct 16 18:07 /usr/local/lib/libgps.so -> libgps.so.18
-rwxr-xr-x  1 root  wheel  220903 Oct 16 18:07 /usr/local/lib/libgps.so.18

How-To-Repeat: # cd /usr/ports/misc/kdeedu4
# make install BATCH=yes
